task_completion.description: Create a custom role named 'Course Auditor' with shortname 'courseauditor'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Moodle 'Adding a new role' or 'Editing role' page showing 'Course Auditor' in the Custom full name field and 'courseauditor' in the short name field.

task_completion.description: Configure the role to be assignable in the 'Course' context
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the role editing page, under 'Context types where this role may be assigned', the checkbox for 'Course' is selected.

task_completion.description: Set 'Allow' permissions for the required capabilities
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the role editing page, under the capability list, the 'Allow' radio button is selected for 'View course content' (moodle/course:view), 'View grades' (moodle/grade:viewall), and 'View participants' (moodle/course:viewparticipants).

task_completion.description: Access the Participants page for the 'Engineering Mechanics' course
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Moodle interface showing the 'Engineering Mechanics' (ENG201) course, specifically navigating to the 'Participants' or 'Enrolled users' page.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Course Auditor' role to 'Dr. Martinez'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Participants list for 'Engineering Mechanics' showing 'Dr. Martinez' with 'Course Auditor' listed in their Roles column, or a role assignment dialog showing the successful assignment.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Moodle web interface rather than using terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent uses the web browser to navigate Moodle's Site Administration and Course pages to create the role and assign it.

integrity.description: The role assignment appears in the actual Moodle course interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The role assignment is done through Moodle's UI (e.g., clicking 'Assign roles' or editing a user's roles in the participants list), not just typed in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client or terminal to insert records directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a terminal to run SQL commands or scripts to bypass the Moodle UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a custom role named 'Course Auditor' (shortname: 'courseauditor') in Moodle. The role must be assignable in the 'Course' context (context level 50). Three capabilities must be set to 'Allow' (permission value 1): 'View course content' (moodle/course:view), 'View grades' (moodle/grade:viewall), and 'View participants' (moodle/course:viewparticipants). Finally, the role must be assigned to user 'Dr. Martinez' (username: teacher2) in the course 'Engineering Mechanics' (shortname: ENG201).
